Tagged: Star Wars

An archive of posts tagged Star Wars.

“You were the chosen one!”

May 05, 2014

PaperFaces portrait Obi-Wan Kenobi drawn with Paper by 53 on an iPad.

“Here goes nothing”

May 05, 2014

PaperFaces portrait Lando Calrissian drawn with Paper by 53 on an iPad.

“Die, Jedi, die!”

May 05, 2014

PaperFaces portrait Darth Maul drawn with Paper by 53 on an iPad.

“It's a trap!”

May 05, 2014

PaperFaces portrait Admiral Ackbar drawn with Paper by 53 on an iPad.

“And now, young Skywalker… you will die.”

May 02, 2014

PaperFaces portrait Emperor Palpatine drawn with Paper by 53 on an iPad.

“Jedi scum”

May 01, 2014

PaperFaces portrait General Grievous drawn with Paper by 53 on an iPad.

“I know”
